voice_observations.caption_text:
How many sweet treats are on this week’s menu? Ate. 🍪✨8️⃣ Nov 18–23 👇

🍃 MINT MALLOW SANDWICH (NEW)
A cool minty mousse nestled between two luscious cookies & cream cookies.

🩷 PINK VELVET CAKE (NEW)
Two tiers of fluffy cake batter-flavored cake layered with smooth vanilla cream cheese frosting and topped with vibrant pink cake crumbles.

🎡 CHURRO
A warm cookie bursting with cinnamon flavor and topped with a swirl of smooth cinnamon buttercream and a dusting of cinnamon sugar.

🍋 LEMON CHEESECAKE
A buttery graham cracker cookie topped with a creamy cheesecake frosting, a tart punch of lemon curd, and a fresh lemon slice.

🌾 OATMEAL SKILLET COOKIE
A gooey oatmeal cookie crowned with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse, a drizzle of butterscotch caramel, and finished with oatmeal cookie crumbles.

🎊 CONFETTI
A warm, delicious vanilla sugar cookie packed with rainbow sprinkles.

🥜 CLASSIC PEANUT BUTTER
An iconic cookie bursting with peanut butter and embellished with a classic cross-hatch pattern.

🍪 MILK CHOCOLATE CHIP
The classic—you can’t go wrong. Thick, soft, and packed with milk chocolate chips.

Beat the rush and preorder your Thanksgiving dessert! 🥧 Crumbl pies are available for preorder on the Crumbl App. Preorders will be fulfilled from Nov 25–27. 🍂

It may be Mini Mondays™ tomorrow... but Minis are now available all week long! 🗣️ Available only in select products while supplies last. ✨
voice_observations.hook_text: How many sweet treats are on this week’s menu?
